prompt: Help me update docs, git range HEAD~1..HEAD, project dir H:/workspace/pick-skills/skills/project-doc-sync/workspace/test-project

assertions.name: identifies_jwt_doc_update_needed
assertions.description: Correctly identifies doc 01 needs update (JWT expiry changed from 15m/7d to 30m/14d)

assertions.name: identifies_new_doc_needed_for_settings
assertions.description: Identifies user settings API is new feature, not covered by existing docs, needs new doc evaluation

assertions.name: does_not_modify_docs_in_eval_phase
assertions.description: Evaluation phase does not modify any docs, only outputs suggestions

assertions.name: uses_parallel_subagents
assertions.description: Uses parallel subagents to evaluate multiple docs

assertions.name: provides_user_confirmation_step
assertions.description: After collecting results, asks user for confirmation
